zh.Of, Middlewich, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾米德列維其
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Grosvenor於1485年出生在英國斯塔福爾潘時，她的父親James Grosvenor39歲，母親Margaret Stanley36歲。她於大約1509年與Richard Oldfield在英國英格蘭爾伊頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1524年在英國越可爾享年39歲。

zh-hans.Of, Middlewich, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾米德列維其
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Grosvenor于1485年出生在英国斯塔福爾潘时，她的父亲James Grosvenor39岁，母亲Margaret Stanley36岁。她于大约1509年与Richard Oldfield在英国英格兰爾伊頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1524年在英国越可爾享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Grosvenor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from French gros ‘big, great’ + veneur ‘hunter’.

History: This is the name of one of the wealthiest families in Britain, which holds the title Duke of Westminster. They have been long established in Cheshire, with strong links with the city of Chester. One of the earliest recorded bearers of the name was Robert le Grosvenor of Budworth, who was granted lands by the Earl of Chester in 1160. The family's fortunes were founded by Thomas Grosvenor (born 1656), who in 1677 married an heiress, Mary Davies, whose inheritance included Ebury Farm, Middlesex. This now forms an area of central London that includes Grosvenor Square and Belgrave Square.

variants.name: Gravenor
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French grand ‘big, tall’ + veneor ‘hunter’. Compare Grosvenor .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Grosvenor was born in 1485, in Penn, Staffordshire, England, her father, James Grosvenor, was 39 and her mother, Margaret Stanley, was 36. She married Richard Oldfield about 1509, in Eaton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1524, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Grosvenor est née en 1485, à Penn, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, James Grosvenor, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Margaret Stanley, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Oldfield environ 1509, à Eaton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1524, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Grosvenor 1485 in Penn, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Grosvenor 39 und ihre Mutter Margaret Stanley 36. Sie hat um 1509 in Eaton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Richard Oldfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1524 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Grosvenor è nata il nel 1485 nel Penn, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, James Grosvenor, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Margaret Stanley, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Richard Oldfield circa 1509, nel Eaton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1524, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Grosvenorが1485年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアペンで生まれた時，父James Grosvenorは39歳，母Margaret Stanleyは36歳であった。約1509年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアエアトンでRichard Oldfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1524年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Grosvenor(이)가 1485년 영국 스태퍼드실르 펜에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Grosvenor(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Stanley(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1509년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 이턴에서 Richard Oldfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1524년 영국 요르크실르에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Grosvenor nasceu em 1485, em Penn, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, James Grosvenor, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Stanley, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Oldfield aproximadamente 1509, em Eaton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1524, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Grosvenor родилась в 1485 г. в местности пенн, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени James Grosvenor было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Stanley, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Oldfield около 1509 г. в местности эатон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1524 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Grosvenor nació en 1485, en Penn, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, James Grosvenor, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Margaret Stanley, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Richard Oldfield aproximadamente 1509, en Eaton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1524, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años.
